title: Anatomy of Fear
summary: "Anatomy of Fear" is a 1955 American television play. It featured an early performance of Geoffrey Horne.
text:
"Anatomy of Fear" is a 1955 American television play. It featured an early performance of Geoffrey Horne.

Premise
A man is implicated in a murder while vacationing with his wife at a summer resort

Cast
Rod Steiger
Geoffrey Horne

Reception
The Western Times Union praised Steiger's "effortless and persuasive performance" but felt the story "ran out of story" early on.
